response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile engineer with strong web/full-stack credentials and some systems-level background, but the role demands deep, current C++ expertise in industrial automation. His only professional C++ experience was a brief stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015; his recent decade is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. He shows no exposure to MQTT, IEC 62443/SDL practices, or industrial protocols, making him a poor match for the core requirements despite solid seniority.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software experience across web, embedded, and desktop systems
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering culture: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience — roughly seven months, and over a decade old
No industrial automation, IoT/MQTT, or IEC 62443 / secure development lifecycle background
Recent focus is full-stack web (TypeScript/Node.js), far from the role's C++/STL systems core
